title: elaeosticta scariosibracteata
intro: Elaeosticta scariosibracteata is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as a type of wild carrot or a fragrant carrot. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elaeosticta scariosibracteata include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Elaeosticta scariosibracteata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
